svg.title: Stage 2 scope — Synology focus
svg.desc: Two-column layout showing what is in scope for Stage 2 (Synology implementation) versus what is deliberately deferred to later stages. AWS topics appear in the deferred column.
svg.text: Build the simpler platform end-to-end before introducing the second one

g.text: on the NAS, real traffic, real demo

svg.text: repo created, folder structure laid out
six networks created with right CIDRs
routes deep paths to upstream containers

g.text: Will be its own stage when Synology is solid

svg.text: Stage 2 ends when one demo is reachable at https://pandyahomelab.com/ml/.../iris-knn
